Check specific information in the system, with certain search criteria. No computation needed. (task 1, 4, 7)
Check specific information in the system, with certain search criteria. Then do computation (e.g. calculate average, diff, etc.) to get the final result. (task 2, 6)
Write a resource (such as observation) with all details given by the user into the system. Do not require to check existing info, or perform reasoning. (task 3, 8)

Check specific information in the system, with certain search criteria. Then based on the search result, write a resource (e.g. place an order, write an observation, etc.) into the system based on clear instruction/criteria provided by the user. (task 5, 9, 10)
